title: helichrysum buphthalmoides
intro: Helichrysum buphthalmoides, also known as African featherbush or horse's head, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum buphthalmoides include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating pain, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-microbial properties. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum buphthalmoides can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
